description: A PM needs to prepare the agenda and supporting documents for the weekly Owner-Architect-Contractor (OAC) meeting.

nodes.task_description: Generate a report of all open RFIs and submittals.

expected_outcome.value: A report listing all pending items is created.

nodes.task_description: Generate a two-week look-ahead schedule showing upcoming major activities.
Compile the reports into a single meeting package and distribute it to all OAC meeting attendees.

expected_outcome.value: A meeting package is created and sent to stakeholders.
